'''Talon Squad''' was one of four [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] that served within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[2nd Platoon]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Insider 84" />

The squad consisted of nine [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]],<ref name="Insider 84" /> one of whom was a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] who acted as the squad's second-in-command.<ref name="Corporal" /> Talon Squad was commanded by [[Green (clone)|Green]], who served as the squad's [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|clone sergeant]]<ref name="Insider 84" /> at the height of the Clone Wars.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|366|Green (2)}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Talon Squad was first mentioned in "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," an eight-page reference article written by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and [[Karen Traviss]] for the [[Star Wars Insider 84|eighty-fourth]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine<ref name="Insider 84" /> and published by [[IDG Entertainment]] on [[September 26]], [[2005]].<ref name="Insider 84 Date">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050913.html|text=The Ultimate Clone Guide in ''Star Wars Insider'' #84}}</ref>
